violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC called maintenance to restock during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The hand-washing sink in the service area was lacking paper towels. PIC called maintenance to restock during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
